member.name: T:TransactionFeeSchedule
member.summary:
The fees for a specific transaction or query based on the fee data.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:TransactionFeeSchedule.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a transaction fee schedule object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TransactionFeeSchedule.FromProtobuf(Proto.TransactionFeeSchedule)
member.summary: Create a transaction fee schedule object from a protobuf.

member.name: P:TransactionFeeSchedule.Feedata
member.summary: Set the total fee charged for a transaction
